name: Service Cloud Dashboard Walkthrough
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Dashboard","bold":true},{"text":" is the first page you'll see when you log into Service Cloud. The dashboard consists of ticket status cards that display your current ticketing queue status at a glance, along with widgets that showcase key metrics in the form of visuals and data."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can further personalize the dashboard by rearranging the widgets with a simple drag-and-drop."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BJ2BWT7A1VRC/dashboard0-281-29.gif","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/BJ2BWT7A1VRC/dashboard0-281-29.gif","name":"dashboard0(1).gif","type":"image/gif","size":533502,"width":759,"height":415,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FBJ2BWT7A1VRC%2Fdashboard0-281-29.gif","active":true,"mediaID":2132,"dateInserted":"2026-01-30T07:41:50+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Note: ","bold":true},{"text":"A personalized dashboard is tied to a user account and is available to the user across multiple accounts."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The following are the dashboard cards and widgets available to you:"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Ticket Status Cards"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Ticket Status Cards","bold":true},{"text":" provide quick insight into the current ticketing queue through the following metrics:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Unsolved Tickets","bold":true},{"text":": Indicates the total count of unresolved tickets."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Open Tickets","bold":true},{"text":": Indicates the total count for tickets in \"Open\" status. "}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Pending & On-Hold Tickets","bold":true},{"text":": Indicates the total count for tickets that are in \"Pending\" or \"On-Hold\" statuses."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"New Tickets","bold":true},{"text":": Indicates the total count for tickets in \"New\" status."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/StatusCards.05T5g00000kXyvwEAC.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/StatusCards.05T5g00000kXyvwEAC.png","name":"User-added image","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":107,"width":600}}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Ticket Summary Widget"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Ticket Summary","bold":true},{"text":" widget shows the hourly ticket creation statistics for the current day and the day before.\n\nThe metrics are displayed in the form of a curve-line graph. The total counts of tickets received and tickets resolved are displayed in the top-right corner."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TicketSummary.05T5g00000kVQqTEAW.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TicketSummary.05T5g00000kVQqTEAW.png","name":"User-added image","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":244,"width":600}}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Tickets by Priority Widget"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Tickets by Priority","bold":true},{"text":" widget shows the number of unresolved tickets categorized based on their priority. The metrics are displayed in the form of a pictograph, in which each circle indicates a specific priority (such as high, medium, or low) and the number in the circle indicates the count of the unresolved tickets."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TicketsbyPriority.05T5g00000kY2HBEA0.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TicketsbyPriority.05T5g00000kY2HBEA0.png","name":"User-added image","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":268,"width":300,"displaySize":"medium"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Tickets by Channel Widget"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Tickets by Channel","bold":true},{"text":" widget shows the number of tickets received through different channels over the selected period of time. The metrics are displayed in the form of a bar graph, and you can select the period for which you want to see the metrics."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TicketsbyChannel.05T5g00000kY2HGEA0.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TicketsbyChannel.05T5g00000kY2HGEA0.png","name":"User-added image","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":270,"width":300,"displaySize":"medium"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Tickets by Type Widget"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Tickets by Type","bold":true},{"text":" widget shows the number of unresolved tickets per ticket type. The metrics are displayed in the form of a horizontal bar graph."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TicketsbyType.05T5g00000kY2HLEA0.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/TicketsbyType.05T5g00000kY2HLEA0.png","name":"User-added image","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":272,"width":300,"displaySize":"medium"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Contact Search "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Contact Search widget lets you quickly find contacts with just a few clicks. You can use it to search for both email and SMS contacts."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Contact Search by Email or Phone:","bold":true},{"text":" To find an email contact, enter their full email address. To find an SMS contact, enter their mobile number in international format: a plus sign (+) followed by the country code, area code, and phone number. If the contact exists, you'll be taken to their "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/712-contact-overview","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"contact overview","bold":true}]},{"text":" page, where you can view and update their information."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"SMS Search Requirements:","bold":true},{"text":" You can only search for SMS contacts if all of the following conditions are met:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"SMS functionality is enabled for your account."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"SMS functionality is enabled for your user profile."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"A \""},{"text":"From Number","bold":true},{"text":"\" has been configured for the account in the Admin panel."}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/FIIWUJVOEH5X/dashboard5.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/FIIWUJVOEH5X/dashboard5.png","name":"dashboard5.png","type":"image/png","size":38697,"width":810,"height":813,"displaySize":"medium","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FFIIWUJVOEH5X%2Fdashboard5.png","active":true,"mediaID":2133,"dateInserted":"2026-01-30T07:45:09+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
